prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学是教育部与江苏省共建的211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其医学学科历史悠久，临床医学、放射医学等专业在长三角地区享 有较高声誉，对湖北考生具有较强的吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。苏州大学地处经济发达的长三角核心城市苏州，地理位置优越，就业前景良 好，进一步推高了湖北考生报考该校医学类专业的意愿。湖北省内医学类招生规模整体有限，优质医学资源竞争激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合考量2026年医学类扩招33.3%的利好因素与近年位次持续大幅上升的强劲趋势，预计2026年苏州大学医学类最低录取位次约为14006名，较2025年位次数字有所增大（更容易 进），但仍处于近年位次上升通道中。预测区间为13586–14426名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Soochow University's medical category in Hubei Province from 2021 to 2025 were 27733, 22633, 20672, 17139, and 11838 respectively, showing a continuous and significant upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), indicating increasing competition. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 8 students in 2021, 6 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 6 in 2025, with considerable fluctuations. The enrollment plan for the medical category in 2026 is 8 students, an increase of 2 students (approximately 33.3%) compared to 6 in 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically would alleviate some competitive pressure, causing the ranking number to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a key national 211 Project university jointly built by the Ministry of Education and Jiangsu Province, selected as a national Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines have a long history, and majors such as clinical medicine and radiology enjoy a high reputation in the Yangtze River Delta region, exerting strong appeal to Hubei candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors nationwide has continued to rise, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, a core city in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta, with excellent geographical location and good employment prospects, further boosting the willingness of Hubei candidates to apply for the university's medical majors. The overall scale of medical enrollment in Hubei Province is limited, and competition for high-quality medical resources is intense.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the favorable factor of a 33.3% expansion in the medical category in 2026 and the strong trend of continuous significant increases in rankings in recent years, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Soochow University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 14006, with the ranking number increasing (easier to enter) compared to 2025, but still within the upward channel of recent years. The prediction range is 13586–14426.
